languages.text: {n}Астартес приподнимает голову, пристально вглядываясь в вас. Синеватая жила на лбу исполина подрагивает, выдавая переполняющее его напряжение.{/n} "Говори".

traits.locale_text: {n}Астартес приподнимает голову, пристально вглядываясь в вас. Синеватая жила на лбу исполина подрагивает, выдавая переполняющее его напряжение.{/n} "Говори".
traits.speaker: Blood_Raven

languages.text: {n}The Astartes lifts his head, his gaze boring into you with unsettling intensity. A livid vein pulses upon the giant's brow, betraying the tension within him.{/n} "Speak."
languages.original_text: {n}Астартес приподнимает голову, пристально вглядываясь в вас. Синеватая жила на лбу исполина подрагивает, выдавая переполняющее его напряжение.{/n} "Говори".

traits.locale_text: {n}The Astartes lifts his head, his gaze boring into you with unsettling intensity. A livid vein pulses upon the giant's brow, betraying the tension that strains within him.{/n} "Speak."
{n}The Astartes lifts his head, his gaze boring into you with unsettling intensity. A livid vein pulses upon the giant's brow, betraying the tension that strains within him.{/n} "Speak."
{n}The Astartes lifts his head, his gaze boring into you with unsettling intensity. A livid vein pulses upon the giant's brow, betraying the tension within him.{/n} "Speak."
{n}The Astartes lifts his head, his gaze boring into you with unsettling intensity. A livid vein pulses upon the giant's brow, betraying the tension within him.{/n} "Speak."

languages.text: {n}Der Astartes hebt seinen Kopf und scheint dich mit seinem Blick zu durchbohren. Eine auf der Braue des Riesen pulsierende Ader verrät seine Anspannung.{/n} "Sprecht."
languages.original_text: {n}The Astartes lifts his head, his gaze boring into you with unsettling intensity. A livid vein pulses upon the giant's brow, betraying the tension within him.{/n} "Speak."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Astartes hebt seinen Kopf und scheint dich mit seinem Blick zu durchbohren. Eine auf der Braue des Riesen pulsierende Ader verrät seine Anspannung.{/n} "Sprecht."

languages.text: {n}阿斯塔特抬起头，他那目光咄咄逼人，盯得你心里发毛。那巨人额头上一根青筋在剧烈跳动，暴露了他内心紧张的事实。{/n}“说吧。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Astartes lifts his head, his gaze boring into you with unsettling intensity. A livid vein pulses upon the giant's brow, betraying the tension within him.{/n} "Speak."

traits.locale_text: {n}阿斯塔特抬起头，他那目光咄咄逼人，盯得你心里发毛。那巨人额头上一根青筋在剧烈跳动，暴露了他内心紧张的事实。{/n}“说吧。”

languages.text: {n}Le membre de l'Astartes relève la tête, et son regard plonge dans le vôtre avec une intensité déroutante. Une veine livide palpite sur le front du géant, trahissant la tension qui l'habite.{/n} « Je vous écoute. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Astartes lifts his head, his gaze boring into you with unsettling intensity. A livid vein pulses upon the giant's brow, betraying the tension within him.{/n} "Speak."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le membre de l'Astartes relève la tête, et son regard plonge dans le vôtre avec une intensité déroutante. Une veine livide palpite sur le front du géant, trahissant la tension qui l'habite.{/n} « Je vous écoute. »

languages.text: {n}El Astartes levanta la cabeza y te clava una mirada de inquietante intensidad. Una vena lívida palpita por encima de la ceja del gigante, delatando la tensión contra la que se debate.{/n} «Hable».
languages.original_text: {n}The Astartes lifts his head, his gaze boring into you with unsettling intensity. A livid vein pulses upon the giant's brow, betraying the tension within him.{/n} "Speak."

traits.locale_text: {n}El Astartes levanta la cabeza y te clava una mirada de inquietante intensidad. Una vena lívida palpita por encima de la ceja del gigante, delatando la tensión contra la que se debate.{/n} «Hable».

languages.text: {n}Astartes başını kaldırıyor, bakışları rahatsız edici bir yoğunlukla sana dikiliyor. Dev adamın alnındaki damar atıyor, içindeki gerilimi ele veriyor.{/n} "Konuş."
languages.original_text: {n}The Astartes lifts his head, his gaze boring into you with unsettling intensity. A livid vein pulses upon the giant's brow, betraying the tension within him.{/n} "Speak."

traits.locale_text: {n}Astartes başını kaldırıyor, bakışları rahatsız edici bir yoğunlukla sana dikiliyor. Dev adamın alnındaki damar atıyor, içindeki gerilimi ele veriyor.{/n} "Konuş."

languages.text:
{n}アスターテスが顔を上げ、不気味なほど鋭い視線を向けられる。巨人の額には怒りの血筋が脈打っており、その緊張が伝わってくる。{/n}
「話せ」
languages.original_text: {n}The Astartes lifts his head, his gaze boring into you with unsettling intensity. A livid vein pulses upon the giant's brow, betraying the tension within him.{/n} "Speak."

「話せ」
